source.description: A reviewed six-panel handmade marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free front-facing fire hydrant on warm off-white paper, with a domed cap, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, wide base flange, four visible bolts, three water drops, highlights, and shadow; no street, curb, hose, dog, character, lettering, logo, sticker outline, badge frame, decorative border, or second hydrant.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one center axis, domed-cap ellipse, cylindrical body, two side-nozzle footprints, base flange, four bolt positions, three-drop zone, and shadow reserve; wraps them with the complete hydrant silhouette; adds the caps, seams, bolts, drops, highlights, and shadow; then inks and colors only those established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: center axis, domed-cap ellipse, cylindrical body guide, two side-nozzle footprints, base flange, four bolt positions, three-drop zone, and shadow reserve
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one upright front-facing hydrant and reserves the cap, nozzle, bolt, water-drop, and shadow placements.

final_elements.name: fire-hydrant silhouette with domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange
final_elements.description: A bold outer contour turns the guides into a readable hydrant while preserving the two nozzle and bolt footprints.

final_elements.name: top-cap seam, two ringed nozzle caps, central body seam, and exactly four visible base bolts
final_elements.description: Specific functional details complete the hydrant without adding a character face.

final_elements.name: exactly three water drops, narrow white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow
final_elements.description: Three small drops, planned paper highlights, and one shadow add playful context without a street scene.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with fire-engine red, yellow, turquoise, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
final_elements.description: Visible felt-tip texture separates the established body, cap, nozzles, bolts, drops, highlight gaps, and shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the center axis, domed-cap ellipse, cylindrical body, two side-nozzle footprints, base flange, exactly four bolt positions, three-drop zone, and shadow reserve at one fixed scale.
introduces: center axis, domed-cap ellipse, cylindrical body guide, two side-nozzle footprints, base flange, four bolt positions, three-drop zone, and shadow reserve

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange while preserving the same front view.
introduces: fire-hydrant silhouette with domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange
requires_prior_elements: center axis, domed-cap ellipse, cylindrical body guide, two side-nozzle footprints, base flange, four bolt positions, three-drop zone, and shadow reserve

frames.visible_job: Adds the top-cap seam, two ringed nozzle caps, central body seam, and exactly four visible bolts along the established base flange.
introduces: top-cap seam, two ringed nozzle caps, central body seam, and exactly four visible base bolts
requires_prior_elements: fire-hydrant silhouette with domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange

frames.visible_job: Adds exactly three small water drops beside one nozzle, narrow planned white highlight gaps, and one violet ground-shadow shape beneath the established hydrant.
introduces: exactly three water drops, narrow white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: fire-hydrant silhouette with domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange
top-cap seam, two ringed nozzle caps, central body seam, and exactly four visible base bolts

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the body red, cap and nozzle faces yellow, water drops turquoise, hardware cool gray, and shadow violet.
introduces: thick black outline with fire-engine red, yellow, turquoise, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
requires_prior_elements: fire-hydrant silhouette with domed top, cylindrical body, two side nozzles, neck band, and wide base flange
top-cap seam, two ringed nozzle caps, central body seam, and exactly four visible base bolts
exactly three water drops, narrow white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established hydrant silhouette, cap seams, two nozzles, four bolts, three drops, marker fills, highlight gaps, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established cap, body, and nozzles

rejection_checks: No cap, body, nozzle, band, flange, seam, bolt, water drop, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The hydrant must retain one front view, center axis, cap width, body height, nozzle placement, base width, scale, and crop across every frame.
Keep the hydrant face-free: no eyes, pupils, brows, mouth, teeth, tongue, or cheek marks.
Reject streets, curbs, hoses, dogs, characters, lettering, logos, extra hydrants, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, mechanically perfect geometry, poster lighting, or clean 3D-rendered metal.
